title: Soccer-Iraq conclude World Cup preparations with a defeat to Venezuela
original_text:

June вЃ 10 (Reuters) - Iraq lost 2-0 to Venezuela вЃ on Wednesday in their final warm-up вЂЊfriendly before the World Cup.

Midfielder Cristian Casseres opened the scoring for the South Americans in Bridgeville, вЂ‹Illinois in the 17th minute вЃ with a close-range вЃ finish.

Venezuela doubled their lead immediately after interval вЃ when вЂЊCasseres won the ball before passing to striker Jesus Ramirez, who вЃ dribbled past a defender and fired вЂ‹in a вЂЊpowerful shot.

Iraq finished the match with вЃ 10 men вЂ‹after forward Ali Youssef was shown a straight red card in the 72nd minute.

Iraq вЃ return to the World Cup вЂ‹finals for the first time since their only appearance 40 years ago, and will вЃ begin their Group I campaign against Norway on June 17 before facing France and Senegal.

Venezuela is not a participant in вЂ‹this year's tournament in вЃ North America, and remains the only South вЂ‹American nation to never вЂЊqualify for the World вЂ‹Cup finals.
